_**User**_

Explore the Next.js app at c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign. I need an inventory of the CONTENT PAGES and their section components that currently exist.

Return:
1. A list of all directories under components/ and what each contains (e.g. components/home, components/about, components/contact, components/solutions?, components/resources?, components/ui, components/shared, components/layout).
2. For the home page and about page specifically: list each section component and a one-line description of what it renders.
3. Whether ANY of these pages/components exist yet: Mission & Vision, Community Impact, LiveBalanced (solutions), LiveBalanced Studio, Reinsurance, Resources (Employees/Employers/Carriers & Brokers), CE Courses.
4. Any existing "collapsible"/accordion component, "carousel" component, "pillar box"/animated hover box component, "story card" component, "article card" component, or newsletter/signup form component.
5. The design tokens / global CSS (app/globals.css) — list the brand color variables and font variables available.

Be thorough. List exact file paths and note what is MISSING vs. present.

---

# ALIC Redesign — Content Pages & Components Inventory

## 1. `components/` directories

| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\about\` | **Present** | 5 about section components + CSS modules |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\contact\` | **Present** | 3 contact section components + `ContactLayout.module.css` + CSS modules |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\layout\` | **Present** | `ResponsiveNav.tsx`, `SiteFooter.tsx` |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\shared\` | **Present** | `CtaButton.tsx`, `StoryCard.tsx` (+ CSS module) |
| `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\ui\` | **Present** | `Reveal.tsx` scroll-reveal wrapper (+ CSS module) |
| `components/solutions/` | **MISSING** | No directory |
| `components/resources/` | **MISSING** | No directory |
| `components/newsroom/` | **MISSING** | No directory |

## 2. Home page sections

Page: `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\page.tsx`

| Section | File | One-line description |
|---------|------|----------------------|
| **Hero** | `components\home\Hero.tsx` | Full-width intro with headline, mission copy, hero image, and anchor CTA to `#foundation`. |
| **Foundation** | `components\home\Foundation.tsx` | Three-column “founding purpose” section with two flanking images, historical copy, and CTA to `#work`. |
| **Work** | `components\home\Work.tsx` | “Our work” offerings list (LiveBalanced™, Expert Advisory, Tools & Resources, Thought Leadership, Community Engagement) as alternating image/text rows with links. |
| **InMotion** | `components\home\InMotion.tsx` | “In motion” news/events mosaic: four `StoryCard` + photo pairs and a newsroom CTA button. |
| **Purpose** | `components\home\Purpose.tsx` | Closing partner CTA with headline, body copy, “Partner with us” button, and “Learn how it works” link to `/about`. |

**Also in `components/home/` (not page sections):**
- `ImagePlaceholder.tsx` — labeled placeholder box for missing images (**exists but unused** in any page today)

## About page sections

Page: `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\(pages)\about\page.tsx`

| Section | File | One-line description |
|---------|------|----------------------|
| **OurStory** | `components\about\OurStory.tsx` | Page hero: “Our Story” H1, tagline, and large history image with gold accent bar. |
| **HistoryIntro** | `components\about\HistoryIntro.tsx` | “History & foundation” heading with introductory paragraph on Alonzo Herndon and the company’s origins. |
| **Timeline** | `components\about\Timeline.tsx` | Interactive vertical timeline of six historical milestones (1858–2023) with images and connector lines. |
| **ThenAndNow** | `components\about\ThenAndNow.tsx` | “Then & Now” mission-continuity section with three rhetorical questions and closing paragraph. |
| **AboutCta** | `components\about\AboutCta.tsx` | Navy closing CTA (“Explore our solutions”) with five solution images in an arc layout (hover lift/scale). |

## 5. Design tokens — `app/globals.css`

File: `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\globals.css`

### `:root` variables

| Variable | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `--background` | `#fffef9` |
| `--foreground` | `#11224d` |
| `--header-offset` | `6.5rem` |
| `--alic-mesh-image` | Multi-layer radial gradient (navy/deep tones) |

### Brand color tokens (`@theme inline` → Tailwind utilities like `text-alic-navy`)

| Token | Hex |
|-------|-----|
| `--color-background` | `var(--background)` → `#fffef9` |
| `--color-foreground` | `var(--foreground)` → `#11224d` |
| `--color-alic-navy` | `#11224d` |
| `--color-alic-gold` | `#d0a540` |
| `--color-alic-cream` | `#fffef9` |
| `--color-alic-light` | `#f1f1f1` |
| `--color-alic-warm` | `#efdbb1` |
| `--color-alic-deep` | `#091024` |

### Font tokens (`@theme inline`)

| Token | Stack |
|-------|-------|
| `--font-sans` | `var(--font-ibm-plex-sans), var(--font-geist-sans), sans-serif` |
| `--font-serif` | `var(--font-hedvig-serif), serif` |
| `--font-mono` | `var(--font-geist-mono)` |

### Font variables loaded in `app/layout.tsx`

Defined via `next/font/google` on `<html>`:

| CSS variable | Font |
|--------------|------|
| `--font-geist-sans` | Geist |
| `--font-geist-mono` | Geist Mono |
| `--font-ibm-plex-sans` | IBM Plex Sans (400, 500, 600) |
| `--font-hedvig-serif` | Hedvig Letters Serif (400) |

Body default: `font-sans` (IBM Plex Sans primary), `text-alic-navy`, fluid base font size via container query clamp.

---

## Summary

**Built today:** Home (5 sections), About (5 sections), Contact (3 sections), plus layout (`ResponsiveNav`, `SiteFooter`) and shared UI (`CtaButton`, `StoryCard`, `Reveal`).

**Stubs only:** `/solutions`, `/resources`, `/newsroom`.

**Not started:** Mission & Vision, Community Impact (as its own page), LiveBalanced Studio, Reinsurance, Resources sub-pages (Employees/Employers/Carriers & Brokers), CE Courses, accordion, carousel, article card, newsletter signup, and entire `components/solutions/` / `components/resources/` / `components/newsroom/` trees.
